'''sasapa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mianna|mianna]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-s-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mianna|mianna]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| sasapa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæsæpæth|sæsæpæth]] || [[word:sæsæpæj|sæsæpæj]] || [[word:sæsæpæsh|sæsæpæsh]] || [[word:sæsæpæ|sæsæpæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sasasapath|sasasapath]] || [[word:sasasapaj|sasasapaj]] || [[word:sasasapash|sasasapash]] || [[word:sasasapa|sasasapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sasapath|sasapath]] || [[word:sasapaj|sasapaj]] || [[word:sasapash|sasapash]] || [[word:sasapa|sasapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sasafpath|sasafpath]] || [[word:sasafpaj|sasafpaj]] || [[word:sasafpash|sasafpash]] || [[word:sasafpaf|sasafpaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sasapatha|sasapatha]] || [[word:sasapaja|sasapaja]] || [[word:sasapasha|sasapasha]] || [[word:sasapaka|sasapaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sasapath|sasapath]] || [[word:sasapaj|sasapaj]] || [[word:sasapash|sasapash]] || [[word:sasapa|sasapa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sasapathal|sasapathal]] || [[word:sasapajal|sasapajal]] || [[word:sasapashal|sasapashal]] || [[word:sasapakal|sasapakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sasapathatha|sasapathatha]] || [[word:sasapajaja|sasapajaja]] || [[word:sasapashasha|sasapashasha]] || [[word:sasapaka|sasapaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sasapathan|sasapathan]] || [[word:sasapajan|sasapajan]] || [[word:sasapashan|sasapashan]] || [[word:sasapakan|sasapakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sasapathaoro|sasapathaoro]] || [[word:sasapajaoro|sasapajaoro]] || [[word:sasapashaoro|sasapashaoro]] || [[word:sasapakaoro|sasapakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
